summary: Completed comprehensive testing of the Inventory Master Module (Sistema de Inventario Maestro). All backend APIs (CRUD for Ingredients, Warehouses, Suppliers, Recipes, Purchase Orders, Stock operations) passed testing. Frontend UI with 6 tabs working correctly. Full PO lifecycle tested including price reconciliation.
passed_tests: Backend: Ingredients CRUD (list, create, get, update, delete) - 5/5 passed
Backend: Warehouses CRUD (list, create, update, delete) - 4/4 passed
Backend: Suppliers CRUD (list, create, get, update, delete) - 5/5 passed
Backend: Recipes (list, create with waste %, delete) - 3/3 passed
Backend: Purchase Orders (list, full lifecycle draft->pending->receive) - 2/2 passed
Backend: Stock operations (list, transfer between warehouses, adjustment) - 4/4 passed
Frontend: Inventory Manager page loads with data-testid='inventory-manager'
Frontend: Insumos tab - shows ingredients list with stock levels and 'Stock bajo' badges
Frontend: Almacenes tab - shows 2 warehouses (Almacen Principal, Barra) with item counts
Frontend: Proveedores tab - shows 3 suppliers with contact info and RNC
Frontend: Recetas tab - shows recipes with ingredients and cost calculations
Frontend: Stock tab - shows stock by warehouse with movement history (adjustment, transfer_in, transfer_out, purchase)
Frontend: Compras tab - shows POs with Parcial and Recibida statuses, price reconciliation displayed
Frontend: New Ingredient dialog - opens and accepts input
Frontend: New PO dialog - has Proveedor/Almacén selects, Items with Agregar, Notes
Frontend: Transfer Stock dialog - has Insumo, Desde, Hacia, Cantidad, Notas fields
Frontend: Adjust Stock dialog - has Insumo, Almacén, Cantidad (+/-), Razón dropdown

seed_data.suppliers: 3 (Distribuidora Nacional, Mariscos del Caribe, Bebidas Nacionales SRL)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Inventory module is fully functional. All CRUD operations for Ingredients, Warehouses, Suppliers, Recipes work correctly. Purchase Order lifecycle (draft->pending->partial/received) with price reconciliation is working. Stock transfers between warehouses and manual adjustments work. Frontend at /inventory-manager with 6 tabs. Admin PIN: 0000.

recipes.notes: Recipes link products with ingredients and include waste_percentage (merma)

purchase_orders.price_reconciliation: Working - actual_unit_price updates avg_cost of ingredient

mocked_apis.status: No APIs are mocked - all endpoints are fully functional
